headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: BNY (NYSE:BK) Vs The Rest Of The Custody Bank Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how custody bank stocks fared in Q1, starting with BNY (NYSE:BK).
